_meta.provenance: Extracted from Khelo_Bharat_Visual_Blueprint.html (concept work, July 2026). Label: Proposed.

pillars.name: GOVERN
pillars.description: The administrative backbone: who is who, which federation is recognised, how schemes and files move, and how grievances get resolved.

pillars.name: DISCOVER
pillars.description: The talent machine: screening games in every school, rewarded teacher-scouts, one lifetime athlete profile, and events that feed it automatically.

pillars.name: DEVELOP
pillars.description: Everything a discovered athlete needs to grow: coaches, facilities, equipment, quality academies and injury care.

pillars.name: SUPPORT
pillars.description: The adoption engine: a card in the pocket, a job after sport, marks in education, and CSR support where it is needed most.

pillars.name: SHOWCASE
pillars.description: The verified public face of Indian sport: stories, galleries, laurels and the Hall of Fame.

pillars.name: INTELLIGENCE
pillars.description: The decision cockpit: national analytics, the State Sports Excellence Index, and a safe framework for data partnerships.
